creator: szuberskidamian@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Bjoern A. Zeeb from comment #19)
I just used `make buildkernel` + firmware from Linux to make sure everything is as it should be.

Interestingly, it worked out for a while. I managed to download git and vim via pkg. Right after that the connection snapped and I lost the device. Attempts to revive it via `netif` failed.

I tried unloading/loading the kernel module but it did not help. The device couldn't be detected again (not covered in the logs below)

laptop# grep -E '(rtw|wlan|wpa_|dhclie)' messages | head -n80
